pi_items.source: Explicitly requested in the task description prompt to apply the Stumpf log-ratio algorithm.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real Sentinel-2 satellite imagery (subset for tests by the homonim project). The task accurately specifies the Stumpf log-ratio empirical bathymetry algorithm (log(Blue)/log(Green)), mapped to the Sentinel-2 RGB band order (Band 2=Green, Band 3=Blue) of the provided file. The required file paths and Band Math expressions exactly match the task description instructions. Note: 'verifier.py' is missing from the environment, making the task technically unscorable by the local automatic evaluator.
